title: Codex collaboration cockpit read-only summary
user_task: As Eva, summarize active Codex collaboration lanes from indexed cards, inbox urgency, watcher requests, and optional Desktop coherence/fallback evidence without running live Codex control or GUI actions.
expected_public_safe_evidence: lane count, attention level, urgencyScore, thread source refs, and safe card state
active-scope recent session cards rank fresh approval/running/waiting lanes ahead of stale low-confidence blocked residue
stale low-confidence blocked residue exposes stale_low_confidence_blocked reason codes instead of silently outranking current work
Desktop state values limited to desktop_visible, fallback_ready, fallback_blocked, cli_visible, unknown, or not_configured
sourceCoverage for recentSessions, cockpitInbox, desktopCoherence, and desktopFallback
actionsPerformed flags showing no live Codex control, no GUI mutation, no raw transcript read, no screenshot capture, no npm publish, and no GitHub Release creation
public-safe scan with zero raw transcript, token, cookie, screenshot, and path leaks
lco.codex.collaborationNextSteps.v1 schema with execute=false tool-call packets
next-step packets for watcher resume, Desktop coherence, fallback status, blocked approval, and observe/no-op lanes
proof_boundary: Dry-run scenario contract for the read-only Codex collaboration cockpit and next-step planner. It may prove public-safe active-lane summarization plus exact execute=false next tool packets from structured cards and supplied Desktop evidence, but does not prove live Codex control, Codex GUI mutation, prompt typing, clicking, refresh/restart automation, Claude parity, npm publish, GitHub Release creation, or 1.1 release readiness.
next_action: Run the collaboration cockpit and next-step planner through focused tests and OpenClaw gateway tool-smoke, then record only public-safe lane counts, reason codes, source coverage, confidence, execute=false packets, and action flags.
